It is an honor to present to you a stunning, beautifully restored, 1931 Art Deco era home. This home is located in the highly desirable Pineapple Village neighborhood of Lake Worth Beach; 1 block off Federal Highway, 3 short blocks from the Intracoastal Waterway and Bryant Park, and only 7 blocks from the beachside community of downtown Lake Worth Beach. As you pull up to the double front gates of the home, you will be struck by the storybook charm, unique architectural detailing, and sheer grandeur of the property that towers above the other homes on the street. Either side of the entrance features vintage, wrought iron lamp posts. The sweeping driveway extends through the exquisitely designed portico, complete with wrought iron chandelier and stone masonry columns, past the picturesque gardens, tastefully decorated with beautiful landscaping surrounding the entire home, and large 3-tier fountain. The driveway continues on along the side of the home providing plenty of private parking for up to 4 cars. The fenced in back garden is expansive, and has been fully landscaped with new grass, exotic cocoa palm trees, tropical banana trees, clusia's, and colorful bougainvillea's. There is easily enough room for a large swimming pool. Both the front, side and back of the house feature new LED multicolor landscaping lights and new modern irrigation system. The home is built 3 ft. above ground on an original stone masonry foundation, featuring 9 foot grand ceilings and stunning, high-gloss, refinished Miami-Dade pine floors throughout. The 32 large windows make this sizable 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom house bright and airy. Step through the glamorous, double door entrance into the grand foyer featuring 9 windows, tasteful ceiling fans and recessed perimeter lighting. The elegance of the room gives you a taste of what is to come. Walk through the French doors into the formal living room that features a rare, Florida cut coral fireplace in pristine condition, vintage crown molding, gorgeous gold chandelier and built-in bookcases with original, inlaid onyx tops. This home exudes class and sophistication! The dining room highlights include a charming, built-in reading nook/window seat below 3 large windows, flanked by original, antique bronze gargoyle wall sconces which tastefully compliment the elegant, gold center chandelier. The kitchen is a chef's dream! It has been completely updated with high-end finishes and features a large, butcher block center island with seating, breathtaking shiny porcelain floors, stunning green cabinetry with a wealth of storage, striking quartz countertops and brand new, top-of-the-line matching Samsung appliances. Under cabinet lighting illuminate the dazzling, Art Deco marble backsplash. Just when you think it can't get any better, step through the French door into the bright and spacious utility room that features a brand-new matching Samsung washer and dryer, extensive storage and granite countertop complete with a sweeping view of the beautiful back garden. The spacious primary bedroom is bright and airy with gorgeous French doors that open into your private ensuite bathroom and walk-in closet. Beautiful windows, new Art Deco style soaking tub, matching gold mirror, wall sconce and vanity complete the look of this modern, yet classic bathroom. The main bathroom features a stunning, navy and white inlaid tile floor, which has been restored to its original glory and matches perfectly with the contemporary amenities you would expect in a new home. To include beautiful Art Deco wall sconces, large walk-in shower, soaking tub and vanity. The lovely second bedroom is bright and does not skimp on space. Complete with original French doors opening onto the foyer, it can be used as a bedroom or an office, your choice. Modern perimeter lighting, central AC and new tankless water heater combine with modern conveniences and a classic, vintage charm rarely seen in houses these days. This truly one-of-a-kind, completely updated, move-in ready home is extremely rare and needs nothing, but you and your furniture. Welcome to your new home!
